title: Causa de Papa Rellena
description: A traditional Peruvian dish consisting of stuffed potatoes with chicken salad and avocado.
instructions: Bake the potatoes at 400°F (200°C) for 45-50 minutes, or until tender.
Meanwhile, grill or cook the chicken breast until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
Let the chicken rest for 5 minutes before slicing it into small pieces.
In a bowl, mix together the sliced chicken, diced onion, diced tomato, mayonnaise, and chopped cilantro.
Once the potatoes are done, let them cool for a few minutes before slicing them in half lengthwise.
Scoop out the flesh of the potatoes, leaving about 1/4 inch of the potato around the skin.
Fill the potato skins with the chicken salad and top with diced avocado.
